## Report persistence (report-store) PR checklist

- [ ] Unit tests for `reportBlobPathname` formatting
- [ ] Integration test for `saveReportAndConfirm` read-back
- [ ] E2E verify script added to CI
- [ ] Docs updated: `docs/REPORT-PERSISTENCE-ALERTING.md` and `SYSTEM_SNAPSHOT.md`
- [ ] Secrets rotated if token was exposed
